description: Use this API to delete the specified dc link from the specified multi-terminal dc line in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_multi_term_dc_link(dc, ibus, jbus, ckt)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line from which a dc link is to be removed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the dc buses connected by the dc link to be removed. (input).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Other dc bus connected by the dc link. (input).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of the dc link to be deleted. (input).

error_codes.description: dc bus not present in this multi-terminal dc line.
circuit identifier is more than one character.
dc link not found in this multi-terminal dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
